quests.title: Build a Discord Bot
quests.teaser: Build a bot that lives in your Discord server and responds to commands — powered by your Java skills.

quests.title: Encryption & Hashing Lab
quests.teaser: How does your password actually get stored? Crack hashes, encrypt messages, and see why security matters.

quests.title: Build a Multiplayer Quiz Game
quests.teaser: Real-time WebSockets, live scoreboards, and a game you can actually play at Coders Farm meetups.

quests.title: Android App from Your API
quests.teaser: Turn your Spring Boot backend into a real Android app. Your API, your data, now on your phone.

quests.title: Linux Basics for Developers
quests.teaser: Every server runs Linux. Learn to navigate, manage files, and feel at home in the terminal.

quests.title: Your Own Coding Assistant
quests.teaser: Run an AI model on your own hardware, understand how LLMs work, and build a chat interface that never phones home.

quests.title: Apply Tracker
quests.teaser: Drag-and-drop Kanban board to track your applications: Applied → Interview → Offer. Like Trello, but yours.

quests.title: Resume Tailor
quests.teaser: Paste a job description, get AI-powered suggestions to customize your resume for that exact role.

quests.title: Salary Heatmap
quests.teaser: Visualize salary data from your saved jobs. See what developers earn across cities, roles, and companies.

quests.title: Email Alerts
quests.teaser: Set up saved searches that run automatically and email you new matches. Your app works while you sleep.

quests.title: Interview Prep Mode
quests.teaser: Click any saved job and get AI-generated practice interview questions tailored to that role.
